narrative:
Archbold One (precinct in Fulton County) has 1,172 registered voters, with 53.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 31.4 percentage points.
